qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Wilfried Singo (Côte d'Ivoire).
Attempt missed. Moisés Caicedo (Ecuador) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Gonzalo Plata.
